# Golden Fixture Provenance

These fixture summaries are generated by `powerbi-cli fixture normalize`.
They intentionally omit absolute paths, raw PBIR blobs, timestamps, Desktop
process data, and screenshot paths so they compare across Windows, Linux, and
macOS.

## sales.summary.json

Purpose: compact scaffold baseline.

Generated with:

```powershell
cargo run -- --json scaffold --schema examples/sales.schema.json --out-dir build/golden-sales --force
cargo run -- fixture normalize build/golden-sales --out testdata/golden/sales.summary.json --json
cargo run -- fixture verify build/golden-sales --expected testdata/golden/sales.summary.json --json
```

## generic-sales.summary.json

Purpose: generic dashboard-build baseline from separate schema/profile/spec
inputs. This proves the data-agnostic macro path compiles a dashboard spec into
the same offline-safe PBIP/PBIR/TMDL project shape as lower-level primitives.

Generated with:

```powershell
cargo run -- schema validate examples/sales.schema.json --json
cargo run -- profile validate examples/sales.profile.json --json
cargo run -- report spec validate --schema examples/sales.schema.json --profile examples/sales.profile.json --spec examples/sales.dashboard.json --json
cargo run -- report build --schema examples/sales.schema.json --profile examples/sales.profile.json --spec examples/sales.dashboard.json --out-dir build/generic-sales --force --json
cargo run -- validate --strict build/generic-sales --json
cargo run -- handoff check build/generic-sales --json
cargo run -- fixture normalize build/generic-sales --out testdata/golden/generic-sales.summary.json --json
cargo run -- fixture verify build/generic-sales --expected testdata/golden/generic-sales.summary.json --json
```

## archetypes/flat-ops.summary.json

Purpose: data-agnostic single-table operations dashboard archetype. This fixture
intentionally avoids `Fact*`, `Dim*`, and sales naming so the builder cannot
rely on domain-specific examples.

Generated with:

```powershell
cargo run -- schema validate examples/archetypes/flat-ops.schema.json --json
cargo run -- profile validate examples/archetypes/flat-ops.profile.json --json
cargo run -- report spec validate --schema examples/archetypes/flat-ops.schema.json --profile examples/archetypes/flat-ops.profile.json --spec examples/archetypes/flat-ops.dashboard.json --json
cargo run -- report build --schema examples/archetypes/flat-ops.schema.json --profile examples/archetypes/flat-ops.profile.json --spec examples/archetypes/flat-ops.dashboard.json --out-dir build/archetypes/flat-ops --force --json
cargo run -- validate --strict build/archetypes/flat-ops --json
cargo run -- handoff check build/archetypes/flat-ops --json
cargo run -- fixture normalize build/archetypes/flat-ops --out testdata/golden/archetypes/flat-ops.summary.json --json
cargo run -- fixture verify build/archetypes/flat-ops --expected testdata/golden/archetypes/flat-ops.summary.json --json
```

## archetypes/scatter-bubble.summary.json

Purpose: scatter/bubble dashboard archetype covering required X/Y bindings plus
optional Category, Size, and Legend roles.

Generated with:

```powershell
cargo run -- schema validate examples/archetypes/scatter-bubble.schema.json --json
cargo run -- profile validate examples/archetypes/scatter-bubble.profile.json --json
cargo run -- report spec validate --schema examples/archetypes/scatter-bubble.schema.json --profile examples/archetypes/scatter-bubble.profile.json --spec examples/archetypes/scatter-bubble.dashboard.json --json
cargo run -- report build --schema examples/archetypes/scatter-bubble.schema.json --profile examples/archetypes/scatter-bubble.profile.json --spec examples/archetypes/scatter-bubble.dashboard.json --out-dir build/archetypes/scatter-bubble --force --json
cargo run -- validate --strict build/archetypes/scatter-bubble --json
cargo run -- handoff check build/archetypes/scatter-bubble --json
cargo run -- fixture normalize build/archetypes/scatter-bubble --out testdata/golden/archetypes/scatter-bubble.summary.json --json
cargo run -- fixture verify build/archetypes/scatter-bubble --expected testdata/golden/archetypes/scatter-bubble.summary.json --json
```

## archetypes/catalog-proof.summary.json

Purpose: neutral generated-visual catalog fixture covering pieChart, donutChart,
matrix (`pivotTable` in PBIR), a clean Basic slicer, and a known-good lineChart
control on separate pages. The generation shapes were adapted from the
Desktop-authored Microsoft BCApps samples archived under `wo-refs/`; see
`wo-refs/NOTES.md` for MIT-license attribution and retrieval details.

This summary proves deterministic generation, strict local validation, and safe
offline handoff only. Desktop canvas/refresh/save/reopen proof is pending and
must not be inferred from this golden.

Generated with:

```text
cargo run --bin powerbi-cli -- schema validate examples/archetypes/catalog-proof.schema.json --json
cargo run --bin powerbi-cli -- profile validate examples/archetypes/catalog-proof.profile.json --json
cargo run --bin powerbi-cli -- report spec validate --schema examples/archetypes/catalog-proof.schema.json --profile examples/archetypes/catalog-proof.profile.json --spec examples/archetypes/catalog-proof.dashboard.json --json
cargo run --bin powerbi-cli -- report build --schema examples/archetypes/catalog-proof.schema.json --profile examples/archetypes/catalog-proof.profile.json --spec examples/archetypes/catalog-proof.dashboard.json --out-dir build/archetypes/catalog-proof --force --json
cargo run --bin powerbi-cli -- validate --strict build/archetypes/catalog-proof --json
cargo run --bin powerbi-cli -- handoff check build/archetypes/catalog-proof --json
cargo run --bin powerbi-cli -- report audit --project build/archetypes/catalog-proof --json
cargo run --bin powerbi-cli -- fixture normalize build/archetypes/catalog-proof --out testdata/golden/archetypes/catalog-proof.summary.json --json
cargo run --bin powerbi-cli -- fixture verify build/archetypes/catalog-proof --expected testdata/golden/archetypes/catalog-proof.summary.json --json
```

## archetypes/regional-sales.summary.json

Purpose: neutral multi-page sales archetype proving drillthrough chains,
TopN-by-measure filters on two different visuals, multi-page slicers, and
non-ASCII column/measure escaping (`Größenklasse`, `Umsatz Übersicht`). It
contains only fictional customer names and synthetic literal rows. It has
local validation and offline-handoff proof only; it has not been opened or
saved in Power BI Desktop.

Every post-build mutation is previewed and then written to a fresh output
directory. `report audit` returns `ok: true` with exactly two expected warning
findings (`filter.possible_persisted_values`) for the two deliberately
authored TopN filters.

Generated with:

```text
cargo run --bin powerbi-cli -- schema validate examples/archetypes/regional-sales.schema.json --json
cargo run --bin powerbi-cli -- profile infer --schema examples/archetypes/regional-sales.schema.json --out examples/archetypes/regional-sales.profile.json --json
cargo run --bin powerbi-cli -- profile validate examples/archetypes/regional-sales.profile.json --json
cargo run --bin powerbi-cli -- report spec validate --schema examples/archetypes/regional-sales.schema.json --profile examples/archetypes/regional-sales.profile.json --spec examples/archetypes/regional-sales.dashboard.json --json
cargo run --bin powerbi-cli -- report build --schema examples/archetypes/regional-sales.schema.json --profile examples/archetypes/regional-sales.profile.json --spec examples/archetypes/regional-sales.dashboard.json --out-dir build/archetypes/regional-sales-build --force --json
cargo run --bin powerbi-cli -- report drillthrough set --project build/archetypes/regional-sales-build --page page:ReportSectionCustomerDetail --target "DimCustomer[Customer]" --dry-run --json
cargo run --bin powerbi-cli -- report drillthrough set --project build/archetypes/regional-sales-build --page page:ReportSectionCustomerDetail --target "DimCustomer[Customer]" --out-dir build/archetypes/regional-sales-customer-drillthrough --json
cargo run --bin powerbi-cli -- report drillthrough set --project build/archetypes/regional-sales-customer-drillthrough --page page:ReportSectionSegmentDetail --target "DimCustomer[Segment]" --dry-run --json
cargo run --bin powerbi-cli -- report drillthrough set --project build/archetypes/regional-sales-customer-drillthrough --page page:ReportSectionSegmentDetail --target "DimCustomer[Segment]" --out-dir build/archetypes/regional-sales-drillthrough --json
cargo run --bin powerbi-cli -- report filters add --project build/archetypes/regional-sales-drillthrough --scope visual --visual visual:ReportSectionCustomerDetail:VisualContainerCustomerDetailTable --target "DimCustomer[Customer]" --top 3 --by "FactSales[Total Revenue]" --dry-run --json
cargo run --bin powerbi-cli -- report filters add --project build/archetypes/regional-sales-drillthrough --scope visual --visual visual:ReportSectionCustomerDetail:VisualContainerCustomerDetailTable --target "DimCustomer[Customer]" --top 3 --by "FactSales[Total Revenue]" --out-dir build/archetypes/regional-sales-customer-top3 --json
cargo run --bin powerbi-cli -- report filters add --project build/archetypes/regional-sales-customer-top3 --scope visual --visual visual:ReportSectionSegmentDetail:VisualContainerSegmentDetailTable --target "DimCustomer[Segment]" --top 2 --by "FactSales[Total Revenue]" --dry-run --json
cargo run --bin powerbi-cli -- report filters add --project build/archetypes/regional-sales-customer-top3 --scope visual --visual visual:ReportSectionSegmentDetail:VisualContainerSegmentDetailTable --target "DimCustomer[Segment]" --top 2 --by "FactSales[Total Revenue]" --out-dir build/archetypes/regional-sales --json
cargo run --bin powerbi-cli -- model dax dependencies --project build/archetypes/regional-sales --json
cargo run --bin powerbi-cli -- model dax lint --project build/archetypes/regional-sales --json
cargo run --bin powerbi-cli -- validate --strict build/archetypes/regional-sales --json
cargo run --bin powerbi-cli -- handoff check build/archetypes/regional-sales --json
cargo run --bin powerbi-cli -- report audit --project build/archetypes/regional-sales --json
cargo run --bin powerbi-cli -- fixture normalize build/archetypes/regional-sales --out testdata/golden/archetypes/regional-sales.summary.json --json
cargo run --bin powerbi-cli -- fixture verify build/archetypes/regional-sales --expected testdata/golden/archetypes/regional-sales.summary.json --json
```

## sales-desktop-filter-contract.summary.json

Purpose: `sales.schema.json` scaffold with a report-scope and a page-scope
categorical filter added, proving the report/page categorical filter shape
that was manually proven to open and render in Power BI Desktop. The Desktop
observations and PBIR rules of record are documented in
`docs/pbir-desktop-oracle.md`.

Generated with:

```powershell
cargo run -- --json scaffold --schema examples/sales.schema.json --out-dir build/golden-sales-desktop-filter-contract --force
cargo run -- report filters add --project build/golden-sales-desktop-filter-contract --scope report --target "DimCustomer[Segment]" --value Enterprise --in-place --json
cargo run -- report filters add --project build/golden-sales-desktop-filter-contract --page page:ReportSectionOverview --target "DimDate[Month]" --value Jan --in-place --json
cargo run -- fixture normalize build/golden-sales-desktop-filter-contract --out testdata/golden/sales-desktop-filter-contract.summary.json --json
cargo run -- fixture verify build/golden-sales-desktop-filter-contract --expected testdata/golden/sales-desktop-filter-contract.summary.json --json
```
